title: cerastium pumilum var. gussonei
intro: Cerastium pumilum var. gussonei, also known as the mossy stonecrop or snow-in-summer, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). The medicinal properties of Cerastium pumilum var. gussonei include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Cerastium pumilum var. gussonei can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
